About me

I build things that make life smoother.

I'm Aditya Maurya, a full-stack developer who loves turning ideas into useful, polished products. I enjoy building software that feels fast, clean, and genuinely helpful in everyday life.

The kind of work I naturally enjoy sits at the intersection of product thinking, backend reliability, cloud systems, and thoughtful UI. I'm happiest when I'm building tools and applications that improve quality of life and remove friction for real people.

Where I've been shipping

Hands-on work across enterprise systems, AI products, fintech dashboards, and education platforms.

Remote

Junior Full-Stack Developer

SpectroNOVA

Jul 2025 — Feb 2026
Built and tested ASP.NET REST APIs and backend microservices supporting 5,000+ active users.
Improved a product showcase website by fixing client-side issues and raising UI reliability.
Designed CI/CD flows with GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps for automated builds, tests, and deployments.
Remote · Contract

Full-Stack Developer

USUALS.AI

Aug 2025 — Oct 2025
Architected a NestJS + Prisma + PostgreSQL backend for 1k+ AI media processing jobs per month.
Worked on an Electron + React desktop app and node-based media generation workflows.
Refined prompt and bias strategies for more accurate, consistent generative AI output.
Remote

Full-Stack Developer

Computing Mind Technology

Jan 2025 — Aug 2025
Led MERN platform development for 200+ learners on AWS-hosted infrastructure.
Set up Dockerized deployments and CI/CD pipelines across EC2, S3, and CloudFront.
Built real-time classes and scheduling systems that improved engagement by 40%.
Bhopal

CS / IT Engineer Intern

BHEL

Jun 2025 — Jul 2025
Analyzed enterprise infrastructure for 1,000+ users with focus on reliability and scalability.
Studied distributed systems, load balancing, caching, CDN layers, and HA deployment patterns.
Reviewed DBMS architectures and hybrid cloud / on-prem system design tradeoffs.
Remote

Software Development Associate

AgroTrac Digital

Aug 2025 — Sep 2025
Developed buyer and seller web pages with stronger responsiveness and usability.
Integrated third-party APIs for dynamic data flow and better product functionality.
Collaborated on bug fixes and enhancements to improve performance and platform reliability.
Remote

Frontend Developer Intern

Sapphire Broking

Jun 2025 — Mar 2025
Served as founding frontend developer and built user-facing interfaces from scratch.
Created onboarding workflows with Surepass API for verification and KYC.
Built trading dashboards with real-time P&L views and interactive data tables.

Building in public

Projects I am actively building right now.

Work in progress

One Chat

A centralized command center that orchestrates entire projects through one master AI workflow. It plans execution, splits work, and routes tasks in parallel to the best model for each job, like Codex for backend-heavy work and Claude for frontend-focused tasks.

Multi-agent orchestration

Work in progress

Quant Pilot

A crypto trading simulator connected to a Solana wallet on devnet using airdrops. It is designed to simulate realistic buy and sell flows, store trade logs on-chain, and power a polished analytics dashboard for strategy tracking.

Crypto trading sim

Work in progress

Chat Domain

A React Flow-style chat workspace where conversations branch as a node tree. Parent context is shared across branches, with built-in actions like summarize, merge, inspect, and export so ideas can evolve in structured threads.

Visual chat graph

Tired of rewriting the same AI prompts every day? I built PopPrompt ⚡ A tiny desktop tool that lives in your menu bar (Mac) / system tray (Windows) so your prompts are always 1 click away. Try it: pop-prompt-web.vercel.app #buildinpublic #AI #Productivity

Link to tweet
Built “Brain” — a concept to fix AI context loss. 🧠 Chats → structured modules 📦 Stored in vector DB 🔗 Retrieved via dynamic prompts Result: better consistency, faster dev, no repeated prompts. Read more 👇 lnkd.in/d97_-Wxm #AI #GenAI #Dev #MachineLearning
